chief_complaint: A 25-year-old man with recurrent diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) presented with tachycardia and disturbance of consciousness.
history: The patient had a history of recurrent DKA and was frequently brought to the emergency room with similar symptoms. Despite DKA treatment, his tachycardia and disturbance of consciousness did not improve.
exam: The patient had a Burch-Wartofsky Point Scale score of 80 points.
labs: No specific lab results are mentioned, but the patient was diagnosed based on the Japan Thyroid Association criteria.
correct_diagnosis: Thyroid Storm (TS) coexisting with Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
differentials: Thyroid Storm (TS) coexisting with Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
correct_ranking: Thyroid Storm (TS) coexisting with Diabetic Ketoacidosis (DKA)
